rejected_candidates.title: The pair releases collateral and clears debt before verifying that redemption or liquidation payment was actually settled
rejected_candidates.reason: `redeemCollateral` and `liquidate` are explicitly restricted to registry-selected handler addresses, so the pair is intentionally trusting protocol-controlled components to perform the corresponding burn/settlement. Without a permissionless path or evidence that those handlers are untrusted in this codebase, this is a trust-boundary/design assumption rather than a standalone reportable pair bug.
